name: quality-suite
description: Meta-bundle: the code-quality category in one install — review, architecture principles, design patterns, testing, security, accessibility, debugging, performance, resilience, dependency hygiene, observability, error handling, concurrency safety, secret-leak prevention (secret-scanning), and file-aware skill auto-routing (skill-router). Uninstall cleanly with /quality-suite:uninstall — removes the bundle and prunes its auto-installed plugins.
